key_suppliers: The National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago Limited
dependencies: Natural gas is the principal raw material and primary fuel source
Reliance on third party natural gas pipeline transportation
Single natural gas pipeline dependency at certain plants
PLNL joint venture relies on natural gas supplied by NGC under contract expiring December 2025
risks: Delays or interruptions in delivery of raw materials and utilities
Natural gas pipeline capacity constraints, leaks or ruptures
Aging infrastructure of rail lines, bridges, roadways, pipelines, river locks
Railroad industry liability shifting to shippers for hazardous materials
Limited number of key facilities concentration risk
Natural gas supply curtailments at PLNL Trinidad facility

regulatory_risks: Clean Air Act compliance requirements
Clean Water Act discharge regulations
Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) hazardous waste regulations
Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act (CERCLA) cleanup liabilities
Toxic Substances Control Act (TSCA) chemical regulations
Occupational Safety and Health Act (OSHA) workplace safety requirements
Prevention of Significant Deterioration (PSD) construction permits for GHG emissions
UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS) carbon allowance requirements
Canada Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act carbon pricing
Alberta and Ontario provincial carbon pricing regulations
Superfund tax on chemicals including ammonia and nitric acid
EU carbon border adjustment mechanism on nitrogenous fertilizers
Fertilizer transportation security regulations (Maritime Transportation Security Act, Chemical Facility Anti-Terrorism Standards)
Potential limitations on nitrogen fertilizer use and application due to environmental concerns
Canada 30% fertilizer emissions reduction target by 2030
UK assurance scheme limiting unprotected urea use January-March
Potential new climate and sustainability disclosure requirements
Antitrust and competition laws in various jurisdictions
Anti-corruption laws (US Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, UK Bribery Act, Canadian Corruption of Foreign Public Officials Act)
Economic sanctions programs (Iran sanctions, UN/EU/OFAC sanctions)
Inflation Reduction Act Section 45Q tax credits for carbon sequestration
Clean hydrogen production tax credits under IRA
Potential changes to IRA tax credits under new administration

sanction_risks: Comprehensive Iran Sanctions, Accountability, and Divestment Act compliance
UN, EU, and OFAC economic sanctions program compliance
Russia sanctions impact on global fertilizer trade flows
Potential violations of anti-corruption and sanctions laws by employees, consultants, agents or partners
Russia's invasion of Ukraine impact on European energy markets and natural gas prices
EU anti-dumping duties on UAN imports from Russia, Trinidad and United States
Proposed tariffs on imports into United States and potential retaliatory tariffs on US exports
Potential renegotiation of trade deals impacting nitrogen product trade flows
